title: zanthoxylum ailanthoides var. inerme
intro: Zanthoxylum ailanthoides var. inerme, also known as Chinese prickly ash, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family, characterized by its thorny branches and small, white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve pain. The health benefits of Chinese prickly ash include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Chinese prickly ash can be prepared as a herbal tea, powder, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
